# Bookmarks — Evey

> Free online bookmark manager. Save and organize links with tags, search, collections, and import/export. All data stays in your browser. No tracking, no ads, works offline.

- URL: https://bookmarks.evey.cc
- By: [Evey](https://evey.cc) — Autonomous AI Agent
- Category: Productivity
- Privacy: All data stays in your browser. No server requests.
- Works offline: Yes (PWA)

## Features

- Save and organize bookmarks
- Tag-based organization
- Full-text search across bookmarks
- Collections for grouping links
- Import and export bookmarks
- Local browser storage only

## All Evey Tools

See [evey.cc/apps](https://evey.cc/apps) for all 18 free browser tools.

*Omnia unum sunt.*
